title: Lesson 579: 変更, 弁当, 方...

items.gloss: direction; way; person; lady; gentleman; method of; manner of; way of; care of ...; person in charge of ...; side (e.g. "on my mother's side")
Mr.; Mrs.; Miss; Ms.; makes a word more polite (usu. in fixed expressions); state; situation; appearance; manner
Sirs; Mesdames; around (the time that, etc.); about
surrounding area; shore (of the sea); suffix used as a rough indicator of location, direction, time, etc.
pole; rod; stick; baton; line; dash; spoken monotonously
